query: What is the maximum number of annual leave days an employee can carry forward?
expected_answer: Employees can carry forward up to 5 days of unused annual leave into the next calendar year.

query: How many days of sick leave are employees entitled to per year?
expected_answer: Employees are entitled to 12 days of paid sick leave per year.

query: When is a medical certificate required for sick leave?
expected_answer: A medical certificate is required for sick leave exceeding 3 consecutive days.

query: How much internet expense does the company reimburse for remote employees?
expected_answer: The company reimburses up to 50 dollars per month for internet expenses upon submission of a valid invoice.

query: What are the core working hours for remote employees?
expected_answer: Remote employees must remain accessible during core hours of 10 AM to 4 PM in their local time zone.

query: Is it allowed to use public Wi-Fi while working remotely?
expected_answer: Use of public Wi-Fi is prohibited unless a VPN is active.

query: What information is prohibited from being entered into external AI systems?
expected_answer: Employees must not input confidential, proprietary, or personally identifiable information (PII) into any external AI system.

query: Who is responsible for reviewing AI-generated content before official use?
expected_answer: Employees are responsible for reviewing, verifying, and approving AI-generated content before it is used in official communications, reports, or decisions.

query: What encryption standard must be used for confidential data at rest?
expected_answer: Confidential data must be encrypted at rest using AES-256.

query: How often must passwords be changed according to the password policy?
expected_answer: Passwords must be changed every 90 days.

query: What is the minimum password length required by the security policy?
expected_answer: All system passwords must be at least 12 characters long.

query: How many days of maternity leave is a female employee entitled to?
expected_answer: Female employees are entitled to 26 weeks of paid maternity leave.

query: How many days of paternity leave does the company provide?
expected_answer: Male employees are entitled to 15 days of paid paternity leave, to be availed within 6 months of the child's birth.

query: What happens if an employee violates the data security policy?
expected_answer: Violation may result in disciplinary action up to and including termination, and may involve legal proceedings in serious cases.

query: How should a suspected data breach be reported?
expected_answer: Any suspected data breach must be reported immediately to the IT security team at security@company.com, and they will respond within 24 hours.

query: What is the eligibility criteria for remote work?
expected_answer: Remote work is available to full-time employees who have completed at least six months of employment and whose roles are suitable for remote execution.

query: How many casual leave days are employees entitled to?
expected_answer: Employees are entitled to 6 days of casual leave per year.

query: What is the maximum leave that can be encashed at the time of resignation?
expected_answer: Annual leave can be encashed up to a maximum of 30 days at the time of resignation or retirement.

query: What must vendors sign before accessing organizational data?
expected_answer: Vendors must sign a Data Processing Agreement before accessing organizational data.

query: How frequently are access rights to confidential data reviewed?
expected_answer: Access rights must be reviewed every 6 months.
